title: Web search 工作流程：从请求到引用回复
title_en: Web Search Workflow: From Request to Cited Response

body.overview: Web search 是一种 server tool——你只需在请求中声明它，Anthropic 的服务器自动执行搜索并返回结果。整个流程对开发者透明，无需编写搜索执行逻辑。

components.name: 你的应用
components.role: 发送 API 请求，在 tools 中声明 web_search，接收带引用的最终回复

components.name: Claude
components.role: 分析 prompt，决定是否搜索、搜索什么关键词，可能在一次请求中多次搜索

components.name: Anthropic 搜索服务
components.role: 执行实际的网页搜索，获取结果并返回给 Claude

body.flow: 你的应用发送带 web_search tool 的请求 → Claude 分析 prompt，决定搜索关键词 → Anthropic 服务器执行搜索并返回结果 → （可选：dynamic filtering 时 Claude 写代码过滤结果）→ Claude 可能再次搜索（多轮） → Claude 综合所有结果，生成带引用来源的最终回复

body_en.overview: Web search is a server tool — you just declare it in the request, and Anthropic's servers execute searches and return results. The entire flow is transparent to developers with no search execution logic needed.

components.name: Your application
components.role: Sends API request with web_search declared in tools, receives the final response with citations

components.name: Claude
components.role: Analyzes the prompt, decides whether and what to search, may search multiple times per request

components.name: Anthropic search service
components.role: Executes the actual web searches, fetches results and returns them to Claude

body_en.flow: Your app sends request with web_search tool → Claude analyzes prompt, determines search keywords → Anthropic servers execute search and return results → (Optional: with dynamic filtering, Claude writes code to filter results) → Claude may search again (multiple rounds) → Claude synthesizes all results into a final response with cited sources
